items.title: Netflix Serves 84% of Query Results from Cache with Interval-Aware Caching in Apache Druid
items.summaryShort: Netflix Serves 84% of Query Results from Cache with Interval-Aware Caching in Apache Druid. Netflix improves Apache Druid performance with interval aware caching, serving 84% of analytics results from cache and reducing query load by 33%.

items.title: Presentation: Evolution of a Backend for a Streaming Application
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Evolution of a Backend for a Streaming Application. Daniele Frasca explains the architectural evolution of Joyn, a German streaming giant.

items.title: Article: Local-First AI Inference: A Cloud Architecture Pattern for Cost-Effective Document Processing

items.title: Podcast: From Java EE to Quarkus and LLMs: Adam Bien’s Playbook for Boring, Future‑Proof Systems
items.summaryShort: Podcast: From Java EE to Quarkus and LLMs: Adam Bien’s Playbook for Boring, Future‑Proof Systems. Adam Bien, an independent consultant and pioneer of zero dependencies in the enterprise world of Java, highlights the benefits of consistently

items.title: New DORA Report Claims Strong Engineering Foundations Drive AI Return on Investment
items.summaryShort: New DORA Report Claims Strong Engineering Foundations Drive AI Return on Investment. Google Cloud's DORA team released a report detailing a framework for assessing the ROI of AI in software development.

items.title: NYT's Wordle to become a TV game show
items.summaryShort: NYT's Wordle to become a TV game show. The popular mobile puzzle game will become a TV game show next year.

items.title: TikTok launches an ad-free subscription plan in the UK
items.summaryShort: TikTok launches an ad-free subscription plan in the UK. Users who sign up for the plan won’t see ads on TikTok, and their data won’t be used for advertising purposes.

items.title: There aren't enough rockets for space data centers. Cowboy Space raised $275 million to build them.
items.summaryShort: There aren't enough rockets for space data centers. Cowboy Space raised $275 million to build them..
